scripts.wait:db: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "while ((docker inspect -f '{{.State.Health.Status}}' logisync-db) -ne 'healthy') { Write-Host 'Waiting for postgres...'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }"
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
scripts.db:setup:local: pnpm infra:up && pnpm wait:db && pnpm db:setup && pnpm db:replica:local
scripts.k6:smoke:auth: k6 run test/k6/smoke/auth.smoke.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:9751 --env ADMIN_EMAIL=platform@logisync.local --env ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin@123456
scripts.k6:smoke:order: k6 run test/k6/smoke/order.smoke.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:9751 --env ADMIN_EMAIL=buyer.manager@logisync.local --env ADMIN_PASSWORD=Buyer@123456
scripts.k6:smoke:rfq: k6 run test/k6/smoke/rfq.smoke.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:9751 --env ADMIN_EMAIL=buyer.manager@logisync.local --env ADMIN_PASSWORD=Buyer@123456
scripts.k6:load:all: pnpm k6:load:order && pnpm k6:load:catalog && pnpm k6:load:rfq
scripts.k6:load:order: k6 run test/k6/load/order.load.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:9751 --env ADMIN_EMAIL=buyer.manager@logisync.local --env ADMIN_PASSWORD=Buyer@123456
scripts.k6:load:rfq: k6 run test/k6/load/rfq.load.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:9751 --env ADMIN_EMAIL=buyer.manager@logisync.local --env ADMIN_PASSWORD=Buyer@123456
scripts.k6:scenario: k6 run test/k6/scenarios/user-journey.scenario.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:9751 --env BUYER_EMAIL=buyer.manager@logisync.local --env BUYER_PASSWORD=Buyer@123456 --env SUPPLIER_EMAIL=supplier.manager@logisync.local --env SUPPLIER_PASSWORD=Supplier@123456
scripts.k6:soak: k6 run test/k6/soak/core.soak.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:9751 --env ADMIN_EMAIL=buyer.manager@logisync.local --env ADMIN_PASSWORD=Buyer@123456
scripts.k6:security: k6 run test/k6/security/cross-tenant.security.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:9751 --env WORKSPACE_A_EMAIL=buyer.manager@logisync.local --env WORKSPACE_A_PASSWORD=Buyer@123456 --env WORKSPACE_B_EMAIL=carrier.admin@logisync.local --env WORKSPACE_B_PASSWORD=Carrier@123456
